name: Roasted Potatoes with Tomatoes and Rosemary
recipeIngredient: 6 each Potatoes, preferably long and narrow
1 teaspoon Minced fresh rosemary (or 1 teaspoon dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cook the potatoes in their skins until tender but still firm.
3. Peel the potatoes and slice them crosswise into half-inch thick pieces.
4. Oil a large shallow baking dish.
5. Alternate layers of potato slices and tomato slices in rows.
6. Drizzle lightly with olive oil, sprinkle with rosemary, chives, salt, and pepper.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the potatoes begin to turn golden crisp around the edges.
